column1: # F3 arithmetic-codec pilot repair explicit-source declaration inventory v1
# excluded from the 151 count: compiler-generated constructors, recursors,
# casesOn/noConfusion helpers, and deriving implementations attached to the two
# inventoried inductives.  They are not separately written source declarations.
# The inductive constants themselves are inventoried.  After elaboration, the
# audit's environmental namespace enumerator separately logs Lean.collectAxioms
# for every generated constant; that runtime layer is not part of this 151 count.
# Dependencies used by designated final public theorems are also covered
# transitively by those theorems' #print axioms results.
# Any future explicit declaration changes this file and invalidates the freeze.
